desc: Long listing sorted by mtime (newest last)
tree, excluding common junk dirs (node_modules, .git, venv...)
zoxide cd — jump to a frecent dir
doc:
z <fragment>            — jump
z                      — back to $HOME
zi <fragment>          — interactive picker

desc: find in CWD and each parent up to /
rsync sync (mirror; deletes extras on dest) — destructive
Optimize / convert images for the web
doc:
imop <file>            — re-encode in place
imop -j 0 <files...>   — parallel batch (0 = nproc)
imop -q 90 <file>      — set quality
See `imop --help` for full format chain

arx <archive>          — list contents
arx -x <archive>       — extract
Supports tar / zip / 7z / rar / etc.

desc: List / edit / get / put files in encrypted S3
doc:
jot                          — list
jot <name>                  — edit (prefix-matched)
jot get <name>              — download to CWD
jot put <local> <remote>    — upload
jot delete <name>           — delete remote

desc: Upload to S3 with codec chain
doc:
jot put <local> <remote>                 — name carries the chain (e.g. .gz.age)
jot put <local> <remote> -a gz.age       — chain via flag
jot put <dir> <remote> -a gz.age         — directory; tar auto-prepended
jot put <local> <remote> -f bob,jim      — encrypt to named recipients

desc: Gather + upload system files per a manifest
Download + install system files (dry-run by default)
doc:
jot-deploy <s3-prefix>            — report-only diff
jot-deploy <s3-prefix> --apply    — install (prompts on overwrite)
jot-deploy <s3-prefix> --apply -y — install, no prompts
